[Version]
Class=IEXPRESS
SEDVersion=3
[Options]
PackagePurpose=InstallApp
ShowInstallProgramWindow=0
HideExtractAnimation=0
UseLongFileName=1
InsideCompressed=0
CAB_FixedSize=0
CancelPrompt=No
ExtractOnly=1
SourceFileList=CraftPacker Package
[SourceFiles]
SourceFiles=CraftPacker Package
[SourceFiles.CraftPacker Package]
%FILE0%=C:\projects\craftpacker\CraftPacker-main\build
[Strings]
AppName=CraftPacker v3
PostInstallCmd=<None>
InstallPrompt=
RunProgram=CraftPacker.exe
DisplayLicense=N
